targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM employee_employee WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(meter_woven), 0) as meters FROM production_production WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) as present FROM attendance_attendance WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'present'
SELECT date as time, SUM(meter_woven) as meters FROM production_production WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

SELECT e.name, e.employee_id, SUM(p.meter_woven) as total_meters FROM production_production p JOIN employee_employee e ON p.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', p.date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY e.name, e.employee_id ORDER BY total_meters DESC LIMIT 10
